text:
administration fee (if 
any, 2010+ only). 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PTD_TOTAL_RX_CST 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This is the price paid for the drug at the point of sale (i.e., the pharmacy counter), and it does not 
include any rebates or discounts that the drug manufacturer provides directly to the Part D plan 
sponsor. 

The value will be null if the beneficiary was not enrolled in Part D or did not use any Part D drugs during 
the year. 
 ^
